name: multipart-mixed
description: Multipart/mixed message with text body and attachment (RFC 2046 section 5.1.3)
input:
From: sender@example.com
To: recipient@example.com
Subject: Message with Attachment
Date: Mon, 27 Jan 2026 10:00:00 +0000
Message-ID: <mixed-123@example.com>
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary="mixbound"

--mixbound
Content-Type: text/plain

Please see attached file.
--mixbound
Content-Type: application/octet-stream
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="data.bin"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: base64

SGVsbG8gV29ybGQ=
--mixbound--
